meta.notes: Read-only research log. No trades are ever placed by this routine.

catalyst.name: Phase 3 REGAL trial (Galinpepimut-S, AML) - event-driven unblind
catalyst.status: 78 of 80 required events reported as of company's May 11, 2026 update; final analysis triggers on 80th event; topline readout guided for 2H 2026
catalyst.next_check: watch for 8-K / press release announcing 80th event

positions.risk_flag: OVER_CONCENTRATED - 69.8% of NAV vs 35% trim threshold

catalyst.name: $25B investment-grade bond deal (priced late Jun/early Jul 2026, $89B demand, proceeds retired bridge loan) + staggered IPO lockup
catalyst.status: First lockup tranche (20% of 180-day block) unlocks 2nd full trading day after Q2 2026 earnings, expected late Jul/early Aug 2026; further 7% tranches Aug-Oct; full lockup expires Dec 8 2026
catalyst.next_check: Q2 2026 earnings date announcement; stock reaction into lockup

positions.risk_flag: WATCH - within cap but second-largest single-name risk; lockup supply event ~2-3 weeks out

flags: SLS at 69.8% of NAV is nearly double the 35% single-name trim threshold, in a pre-binary-catalyst biotech with no news that breaks the thesis but no catalyst confirmation either.
Zero USD cash buffer - account fully invested, no dry powder to add on weakness (not on margin, so no forced-liquidation risk).
SPCX facing its first staggered lockup unlock in ~2-3 weeks; stock already down 4-5% pre-market with no negative credit news (bond was oversubscribed, investment-grade).

catalyst.name: Phase 3 REGAL trial (Galinpepimut-S, AML) - event-driven unblind
catalyst.status: Still blinded at 78 of 80 required events as of latest confirmed reporting (mid-July 2026); no 80th-event / database-lock press release found as of this run. Stock popped ~12% on 2026-07-17 on CEO Fox Business appearance and quiet-period language; retail speculation about a possible buyout is circulating on social/retail media but is UNVERIFIED - no company statement, filing, or credible outlet confirms any M&A process.
catalyst.next_check: watch for 8-K / press release announcing 80th event and database lock

positions.risk_flag: OVER_CONCENTRATED - 72.7% of NAV vs 35% trim threshold (worse than last run); trim ~35.8 of 69 shares to reach 35% NAV

catalyst.name: IPO lockup unlock, now anchored to a confirmed Q2 2026 earnings date
catalyst.status: SpaceX confirmed on 2026-07-21 it will report Q2 2026 results after market close on 2026-08-04 (first earnings report as a public company). This locks in the first insider lockup tranche: ~20% of the 180-day block (~911.5M shares, reported ~$116B value) becomes sellable 2nd full trading day after earnings, i.e. ~2026-08-06. A bonus 10% tranche only unlocks if SPCX trades >=$175.50 (30% above the $135 IPO price) for 5 of 10 days before earnings - not close, stock is ~8.5% BELOW IPO price. Further 7% tranches ~Aug 21 and Sept 10; full lockup expires 2026-12-08. $25B investment-grade bond (5 tranches, 2031-2056 maturities) settled June 26, unrelated credit concerns not a factor in the decline.
catalyst.next_check: Stock reaction into 2026-08-04 earnings and 2026-08-06 first unlock date

positions.risk_flag: WATCH - within 35% cap, down 15.3% since last run (2026-07-11) mostly on lockup-supply overhang now that the earnings/unlock date is confirmed and near (~2 weeks out)

flags: SLS concentration worsened to 72.7% of NAV (from 69.8% on 2026-07-11), still no confirmed catalyst event; retail buyout chatter is unverified speculation, not a fundamental development - do not treat as thesis-confirming.
Zero USD cash buffer persists - no dry powder to add on weakness (not on margin, so no forced-liquidation risk).

SPCX's first lockup unlock now has a hard date (~2026-08-06) tied to the confirmed 2026-08-04 earnings report - the previously vague 'late Jul/early Aug' overhang is now a concrete near-term event ~2 weeks away.
Account NAV down ~4.0% (USD) / ~3.9% (EUR) since 2026-07-11, driven almost entirely by SPCX's -15.3% move; SLS roughly flat over the same window.
